title: No Caves
description: Collection of datapacks to stop All Caves,  New Caves, or even the Old Carver Caves from generating.
body:
# No Caves
Don't want caves? You're in luck! This datapack removes them. There are still underground features and structures (Ancient Cities, Strongholds, Mineshafts, Amethyst Geodes, Lava Pools, Ores, etc.) but no more caves. Additionally, this datapack has sister versions that remove specific types of caves, like only removing the new caves or old caves. The datapacks now work with the Large Biomes and Amplified Presets!

## No Caves
<u>Removes all caves</u>

## No Old Caves
<u>Removes all the old carver caves</u>, leaving just the 1.18+ caves (noise caves)

## No New Caves
<u>Removes all of the 1.18+ caves (noise caves)</u>, leaving only the classic carver caves

## Compatibility Notes: 

In order to use this with other packs, No Caves must be the top-most level datapack (e.g. it should appear higher on the list, above other datapacks). 

Compatibility has to be made *manually* depending on *how* the mod handles their caves. Sometimes, it is done automatically though, it just depends on what they do. That being said, I plan on adding support for mods like Tectonic, Terralith, and more.

## "Where did 'Retro Caves' Go?" / "I wish 'No New Caves' had more caves like pre-1.18 did..."
### <u>Checkout [Retro Caves](https://modrinth.com/datapack/retro-caves)</u>
